FR-01.title: Vehicle Registration
requirements: Implement complete vehicle registration functionality
All vehicle registration operations must be validated and authorized
System shall maintain audit log for vehicle registration actions
Support search and filtering within vehicle registration
Enable notifications for important vehicle registration events
acceptance_criteria: User can successfully perform all vehicle registration operations
System validates all vehicle registration inputs correctly
Error messages display clearly for vehicle registration failures
vehicle registration data persists correctly across sessions
